name: Lethargic
ability: 1 player has your crab. If you guessed (once) who it is & more than 3 players live, you can't die. The Demon knows you are in play.
flavor: I can never sleep without Mr. Claws!! Can you please, sir, help me find him? (v1.4)
firstNightReminder: During Demon Info, show the Demon the Lethargic token. If you haven't done this yet, do so now. Wake the player with the Has Crab reminder. Show the *THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU* token & the Lethargic token.
